response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, TX, reported a total revenue of $54.4 million for the year, with quarterly revenues of $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and $16.2 million in Q4. The company experienced a year-over-year growth of 18% and employs a workforce of 342 individuals.
